channel.title: Posts on Categorical Ethos
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Categorical Ethos

item.title: Eckman-Hilton Argument
item.description:
Proposition

let \(\circ\), \(\ast\) be 2 unital binary operation, with \(u, v\) their units respectively. If they satisfy the equation $$ (a \circ b) \ast (c \circ d) = (a \ast c) \circ (b \ast d) $$
